title: Climbing Indicator
description: This is a simple toggleable Minecraft mod for Fabric, that displays how many blocks you need to climb UP/DOWN (in the action-bar) when climbing something (to reach bottom/top).
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Climbing Indicator** is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows you to see how many blocks you need to travel to get to the **top** or **bottom** of a chain of climbable blocks. This mod utilizes the Minecraft **Action Bar** to display climbing information. As of **[v1.0.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/climbing-indicator/version/1.0.1)**, the mod will **display how many minutes/seconds it will take the user to reach the top or bottom** of a chain of climbable blocks, along with the other climbing info. This mod can be toggle **ON** or **OFF** with this command that it adds: **/toggleclimbingdisplay**.

For a visual of the mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or see this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/climbing-indicator/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/98agtuxUbGE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Why Download?**

If you have a tall ladder (or anything tall & climbable) at your base, it is **good to know when you will reach the top or bottom** of it.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
